title: Happy Ghasts Boost
description: Increase your speed while traveling in a straight line with your Happy Ghast, and combine speed potions to go even faster!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/HAPPY_GHASTS_BOOST/MP_HAPPY_GHASTS_BOOST_Header.webp) If you travel for a few seconds in the same direction, your Happy Ghast will receive a speed boost that remains active as long as you don’t change course. This makes traveling much more fun, fast, and efficient. Full compatibility with Vanilla Backport! ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/HAPPY_GHASTS_BOOST/MP_HAPPY_GHASTS_BOOST_Description.webp) When you keep moving in the same direction for a few seconds, your Happy Ghast gains a speed boost that remains active until you change course. This makes traveling a much smoother, more dynamic, and enjoyable experience. Additionally, Happy Ghasts now react to speed potions, allowing them to travel even faster. Finally, compatibility with the Vanilla Backport mod has been added for versions 1.20.1 and 1.21.1, ensuring a seamless experience across both. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/HAPPY_GHASTS_BOOST/MP_HAPPY_GHASTS_BOOST_Faq.webp) ### Is it compatible with other mods that add Happy Ghasts? ### Compatibility with the Vanilla Backport mod has been added. In fact, it is essential to have it installed for the mod to work on versions 1.20.1 and 1.21.1. ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/HAPPY_GHASTS_BOOST/MP_HAPPY_GHASTS_BOOST_Screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IavCsUgJ/images/3a4f0f3dae6d581cb46a0851de932693df09ee80.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IavCsUgJ/images/f48b997c9b623b82dee6d954f23083ba2c8e2662.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
